claims.summary: Minime uses PI regulation with bounded steps, integrator leak, and actuator-aware anti-windup.
claims.disposition: Verify current PI source rather than treating the controller as unbounded accumulation.

claims.summary: Pressure and viscosity are multidimensional evidence but do not currently control Ki.
claims.disposition: Verify semantic-viscosity coefficients are legacy-compatible, inert, and explicitly non-controlling.

claims.summary: Pressure-step and lambda-tail observations can test lag, buffering, and afterimage without retuning PI.
claims.disposition: Route copied telemetry through bounded pressure/viscosity comparison.

claims.summary: Mapping mode packing, pressure, or viscosity directly into Ki would alter live PI behavior.
claims.disposition: Hold gain, leak, filter, and controller changes behind exact Mike/operator approval.
